description: Execute V0.8.5 M1: Implement the 'team-agents-cowork uninstall' command. This command must safely and cleanly remove the framework from a repository to support iterative internal testing and clean rollbacks.
scope: 1. Create bin/agent-protocol-uninstall.js. 2. Implement logic to remove the .agent-state/ directory completely. 3. Update the local .gitignore to remove the .agent-state/ entry. 4. Execute 'git worktree prune' to clean up any orphaned headless worktrees. 5. Register the 'uninstall' subcommand in the unified router bin/team-agents-cowork.js.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the Worktree Manager (M2) or MCP Filesystem Proxy (M3) logic in this phase. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of this M1 progression.
